Dream Horse Classifieds

"We make your Friesian horse dream a reality!." We specialize in pure bred horses. Discover our premium curated catalog of horses from champion bloodlines, bred for performance and beauty.

Welcome to Dream Black Horse Farm

Dream black horse farm is the best place to create that genuine Friesian connection. We are experienced Friesian horse breeders and specialized in pure bred Friesians. If you're looking to buy a friesian we can aid in your unique equestrian journey.

Trusted Affiliates & Industry Connections

Featured Collection

Exceptional horses currently available for discerning buyers

Olivier

Aukje

Journey to Ownership

A seamless, transparent process designed to unite you with your perfect equine partner.

Step 1

Browse & Select

Explore our curated collection of premium Friesians online.

Step 2

Consultation

Discuss your goals with our experts to find your perfect match.

Step 3

Vet Review

Complete veterinary examination and review of health records.

Step 4

Documentation

Secure purchase agreement and export paperwork processing.

Step 5

Transport

Professional door-to-door delivery coordination worldwide.

Step 6

Welcome Home

Arrival of your new partner and start of your journey together.

FHANA Ride and Drive Service Areas

We pride ourselves to be a major player in the Friesian industry, importing directly from Friesland. Whether you're looking for a Friesian stallion, Friesian mare, or Friesian foal, our long-lasting experience and trusted equine connections created over the years guarantee us a global network. Distance is never an obstacle to finding your dream horse.

Nationwide Coverage

From coast to coast, we coordinate professional transport to any state or province.

Safe & Secure

Our transport partners use air-ride suspension trailers with video monitoring.

Flexible Scheduling

Weekly routes available to major equestrian hubs across North America.

Latest Insights

Stay updated with our latest news, expert tips, and stories from the farm.

KFPS FriesianMar 31, 2026

From Roblox to Reality: Why Friesian Horses Are So Expensive, In Games and Real Life

You've been there. Sitting in Roblox Horse Life, refreshing the server, waiting for that chat notification: "A Friesian has spawned." Your heart jumps. You sprint across the map, Epic lasso in hand, hoping no one else gets there first. And when you finally tame that sleek black beauty with its flowing mane and high-stepping gait, it feels like you've won something rare. Because you have.

Read More
care tipsMar 30, 2026

Is a Friesian Horse Right for Beginners? What You Need to Know

There's a reason Friesian horses show up in fantasy films, royal processions, and dream Pinterest boards. With their flowing black manes, feathered legs, and powerful yet graceful movement, Friesians look like they stepped straight out of a fairy tale.

Read More
KFPS FriesianMar 30, 2026

Why Choose Dream Black Horse Farm to Buy Your Friesian Horse

You've done the research. You've fallen in love with the breed. You know a Friesian is the horse you want. Now comes the most important decision of the entire journey, who do you trust to find that horse for you? At Dream Black Horse Farm, we believe buying a Friesian horse should feel as magical as the breed itself. Whether you're a first-time owner in search of a beginner-friendly Friesian horse, an experienced equestrian ready to add a Friesian mare, gelding, or stallion to your program, or a breeder looking for your next Friesian broodmare, we built this farm for you.

Read More

Begin Your Journey With Us

Connect with us to find your perfect equine partner. Our team is ready to guide you through every step of this exciting process.
